Vendor Risk — ABC Engineering Pvt Ltd
Flagged for 3 consecutive delayed deliveries. 2 pending POs worth ₹4,20,00,000 under review.
Exceeded by ₹2,30,00,000. Cost centre: CC-1042. SAP posting blocked pending CFO approval.
14 approved requests awaiting SAP posting confirmation. Next sync scheduled at 18:00 IST.
